TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_family_Paicu

S.FORM: te ku poisua sua er tanasa er cani pininga.
S.TRANSL: 我要講關於我的家庭。
I want to talk about (my) family.

S.FORM: er miana iikim 'esi pa coomaku cinaa maku er kinvavaia 'esi pa kangvang.
S.TRANSL: 以前，我爸爸還在，我媽媽，我兄弟姊妹，全部都還在。
In the past, my father was still alive, my mother and my siblings were all alive.
以前，我爸爸還在，我媽媽，我兄弟姊妹，全部都還在。我們就那樣了。
In the past, my father was still alive, my mother and my siblings were all alive. We were so.

S.FORM: er 'una ku vai nanakʉ kanarua iiku iiku marang kanakana'ua makasua cu kim.
S.TRANSL: 我有一個姊妹，(更正確地說)是妹妹。我是兄弟姊妹當中年紀最大的。我們就那樣了。
I have a female sibling, (more precisely) a younger sister, I am the oldest among my siblings. We are so.

S.FORM: matirupaang marisinatU po po'i ci kia 'aan 'aan ci kia marisinatU er makasua cu.
S.TRANSL: 完成學業我就回來，我就不(繼續)讀書了。就這樣。
Finishing studying, I went back to home, I didn't (continue to) study. That was so.

S.FORM: ta'u tavarU'Un ci kia umara cau 'una Uncoo er er mamarang makasi tia kan poru poru'ucaangUn misee poru'ucaangUn muru'ucaang ai er.
S.TRANSL: 我父母說要讓我結婚。
My parents said (that they) wanted to make me get married.

S.FORM: er muru'ucaang er kim Mu Mu'u nganaiin Mu'u Mu'u PaicU sua nganai mia makasua cu kim miana.
S.TRANSL: Mu'u是他的名字，Mu'u和PaicU是我們的名字。我們以前就是那樣了。
Mu'u is his name, and Mu'u and PaicU are our names. We were so in the past.

S.FORM: er mamarurang marang cu mamarang maku 'aan cu tavarU'U putukikio mau'ura pi kim mau'ura pi kim.
S.TRANSL: 父母年長了，我的父母年長了不能工作了，(但)我們(兄弟姊妹們)年紀還很小。
(Our) parents got aged, (our) parents got aged (so that they) could not work, (but) we (siblings) were still very young.

S.FORM: 'akia kUna 'una ai mUmUkU mUmUkU mamarang miana tanUkU tammi 'una vina'U kUna kUna miana.
S.TRANSL: 沒有食物，長輩們以前有種芋頭、地瓜和小米。(這些是)以前的食物。
There was no food, (and our) parents grew taroes, sweet potatoes, millets in the past. (They were) the food in the past.
沒有食物，長輩們以前有種芋頭、地瓜和小米。(這些是)以前的食物。我們就那樣了。
There was no food, (and our) parents grew taroes, sweet potatoes, millets in the past. (They were) the food in the past. We were so.

S.FORM: masiin marang marang ci kia masiin marurang ci kia masiin 'akia er vaantuku 'aan ci kia tavarU'U kavanvaantuku marang cu miaranasU kia mamia sii 'akia manu saronai.
S.TRANSL: 沒有錢，沒辦法賺錢，(因為)我年紀大了，我只有困苦著，因為(我父母)沒有男孩子。
There was no money, I couldn't make money (because) I got aged. I could only be tough, because (my parents) didn't have any boy.

S.FORM: ucaan mamia na kanakana'ua maku acecu 'akia cu mamane.
S.TRANSL: 我只有一位哥哥，已經走了，不在人世間了。
I only had one late older brother, (who already) left and was't in the world.

S.FORM: er ci kim er cani pininga.
S.TRANSL: 我們一家人……了。
We the whole family....
我們(家)娶了我哥哥的伴侶，我哥哥的配偶，我們所娶的是住瑪雅里的。
We (our family) took my older brother's partner, my older brother's spouse, the person we took lived in NU'Uvana.
我們……跟那個女人(哥哥的老婆)很好的相處。
We ...got along with the woman (my older brother's spouse).

S.FORM: er noo no'onaniin mararuai ci kim.
S.TRANSL: 之後我們就分開了。
Well, afterwards, we were separated from each other.

S.FORM: mu mucaan cu nguani katatanasa karanana kim.
S.TRANSL: 他們就離開蓋房子，跟我們不同。
They left to build (their) house, and were different from us.

S.FORM: er makasia cu kim miaranasU sii 'akia nononoman serupaca.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣子，我們很困苦，因為沒有可以使用的各種工具。
We were tough in this way, because we didn't have the tools that we could use.

S.FORM: mataa er cinaa maku na cinaa maku marang kangvang na coomaku marang cu kangvang er 'akia 'akia cu masiin er 'akia 'akia cu mamane masiin.
S.TRANSL: 原本的媽媽也年老了，原本的爸爸也年老了，現在沒有了，不在人間了。
(My) late mother also got old, (my) late father also got old; they don't exist now, they aren't in the world now.
